# Index — gotchas
<!-- GENERATED by kb-render.sh — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->

- [Conductor OSS is hidden — never call it directly](./conductor-is-hidden.md) — `gotcha` — The durable engine is an internal implementation detail; peers only ever call ps-workflow's L2 HTTP API
- [Execution API is start + get only](./execution-api-is-start-plus-get-only.md) — `gotcha` — Only start and get-status are implemented; there is no pause/resume/terminate/search despite the README's design intent
- [runtime-stop and collect-result may return NOT_LIVE](./gated-not-live-nodes.md) — `gotcha` — Two nodes register but report a NOT_LIVE terminal state until their orchestrator routes are deployed on the target stack
- [Node identifiers: session_id is a name, runtime_uuid keys the instance](./node-identifier-names-vs-values.md) — `gotcha` — Two node identifier fields carry a value that diverges from what the name implies — session_id is a session name, runtime_uuid resolves to the runtime instance
- [Park-style task defs must use retryCount:0](./park-nodes-retrycount-zero.md) — `gotcha` — A Conductor retry on a park-style node re-fires its parked side effect and wedges the workflow, so those task defs register with retryCount:0
